raw_reaction: 正しいが、殺された一様ジャンプ過程のPoisson方程式・Feynman-Kac占有報酬と同じ式を後退方程式と呼んだものに近い。生涯忘れない別解とは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly solves the original expectation through the backward equation for the killed residual-capacity Markov chain, but it is substantially the same as existing killed jump/Markov reward/Feynman-Kac formulations.
